name: Illusion
tagline: Deceive the senses with figments, phantasms, and shadows.

baseAbility.name: Figment / Glamer / Trick
baseAbility.description: Standard action, 1 SP. Figment: create an illusion in an area (concealment if it blocks sight; disbelieved on interaction, with +5 to the save per missing sensory talent you lack). Glamer: attach an illusion to a creature or object, altering its apparent appearance. Trick: a short simple illusion effect (e.g. minor sensory tricks) lasting a set duration or until dismissed. Lasts while you concentrate, or 1 more SP for a longer fixed duration.

talents.name: Illusionary Sound (sensory)
talents.description: Your illusions can convincingly include sound, removing the auto-disbelieve penalty for that sense.

talents.name: Illusionary Touch (sensory)
talents.description: Your illusions can convincingly include touch/texture, and illusionary creatures/attacks can deal a little real damage to those who don't disbelieve.

talents.name: Illusionary Odor (sensory)
talents.description: Your illusions can convincingly include smell, fooling creatures who rely on scent.

talents.name: Illusionary Disguise (glamer)
talents.description: New glamer: change a creature or object's apparent appearance, like a magical disguise.

talents.name: Complex Illusions
talents.description: Your figments can include multiple independent creatures/objects instead of one static scene.

talents.name: Lingering Illusion
talents.description: Illusions persist for a while after you stop concentrating instead of vanishing immediately.

talents.name: Selective Illusions
talents.description: Choose specific creatures who automatically see through your illusions (typically your allies).

talents.name: Greater Illusions
talents.description: Increase the maximum size and complexity of illusions you can create.

talents.name: Coaxing Decoy (trick)
talents.description: New trick: create a decoy illusionary creature that grants a miss chance to attacks against a target.

talents.name: Shadow Lurk
talents.description: Animate a temporary quasi-real duplicate of yourself out of shadowstuff to act as a decoy or minor combatant.
